panels.description: Tdarr server self-reported health from /api/v2/status: 1 = good (Healthy), 0 = problem. Raw status string is on tdarr_server_status_info.
panels.title: Server Status

panels.description: Tdarr server process uptime from /api/v2/status (Node.js process.uptime, seconds).
panels.title: Server Uptime

panels.description: Tdarr server version reported by /api/v2/status.
panels.title: Tdarr Version

panels.description: Tdarr server operating system reported by /api/v2/status.
panels.title: Tdarr OS

panels.description: Filters by Prometheus job, not tdarr_instance — multi-deployment users may see all jobs.
panels.title: Exporter Up

panels.description: Custom gauge — 1 if the last collection cycle succeeded, 0 if any failure occurred (Tdarr API error, response parse error, or partial pie-stats fetch). Check exporter logs for root cause when 0.
panels.title: Tdarr Collector Success

panels.description: Rate of /metrics endpoint requests returning non-2xx (handler errors, misroutes, panics). Distinct from Tdarr API failures.
panels.title: Handler Errors (5m)

panels.description: Exporter build version from tdarr_exporter_build_info (set at build time via ldflags).
panels.title: Exporter Version

panels.description: Current number of files in the library.
panels.title: Files by Library

panels.description: Cumulative completed transcodes over the library's lifetime. A file is counted again each time a transcode alters it (e.g. after a flow/process change), so this can exceed the file count. Failed jobs excluded. Per-status breakdown: tdarr_library_transcodes.
panels.title: Transcodes by Library

panels.description: Cumulative completed health checks over the library's lifetime. A file can be checked more than once, so this can exceed the file count. Failed jobs excluded. Per-status breakdown: tdarr_library_health_checks.
panels.title: Health Checks by Library

panels.description: Lifetime net space saved per library. Positive = saved, negative = grew. Includes size differences from any deleted or replaced files. Live server total: see 'Size Difference (Server Total)'.
panels.title: Size Diff by Library

panels.description: Current net space saved across files on disk now. Positive = saved, negative = grew. Live - excludes deleted files, so lower than the sum of per-library values.
panels.title: Size Difference (Server Total)

panels.description: Current number of files in the library.
panels.title: Total Files

panels.description: Cumulative completed transcodes over the library's lifetime. A file is counted again each time a transcode alters it (e.g. after a flow/process change), so this can exceed the file count. Failed jobs excluded. Per-status breakdown: tdarr_library_transcodes.
panels.title: Total Transcodes

panels.description: Cumulative completed health checks over the library's lifetime. A file can be checked more than once, so this can exceed the file count. Failed jobs excluded. Per-status breakdown: tdarr_library_health_checks.
panels.title: Total Health Checks

panels.description: Percent of all media files successfully transcoded (successful ÷ total files).
panels.title: Tdarr Score (%)

panels.description: Percent of all media files successfully health-checked (successful ÷ total files).
panels.title: Health Check Score (%)

panels.description: Lifetime net space saved for the selected library(ies). Positive = saved, negative = grew. Includes size differences from any deleted or replaced files. Server live-current total: see 'Size Difference (Server Total)'.
panels.title: Size Difference (GB)

panels.description: Files currently in an error state (point-in-time, from the per-status breakdown) — not a lifetime total.
panels.title: Transcode Errors

panels.description: Files currently in an error state (point-in-time, from the per-status breakdown) — not a lifetime total.
panels.title: Health Check Errors

targets.expr: sum by (worker_id) (tdarr_node_worker_ratio{tdarr_instance=~"$tdarr_instance", node_name=~"$node_name"} and on (worker_id) tdarr_node_worker_info{tdarr_instance=~"$tdarr_instance", node_name=~"$node_name", flow_worker="true"})

sum by (worker_id) (tdarr_node_worker_fps{tdarr_instance=~"$tdarr_instance", node_name=~"$node_name"} and on (worker_id) tdarr_node_worker_info{tdarr_instance=~"$tdarr_instance", node_name=~"$node_name", flow_worker="true"})

sum by (worker_id) (tdarr_node_worker_eta_seconds{tdarr_instance=~"$tdarr_instance", node_name=~"$node_name"} and on (worker_id) tdarr_node_worker_info{tdarr_instance=~"$tdarr_instance", node_name=~"$node_name", flow_worker="true"})

sum by (worker_id) (tdarr_node_worker_original_file_size_bytes{tdarr_instance=~"$tdarr_instance", node_name=~"$node_name"} and on (worker_id) tdarr_node_worker_info{tdarr_instance=~"$tdarr_instance", node_name=~"$node_name", flow_worker="true"})

sum by (worker_id) (tdarr_node_worker_est_file_size_bytes{tdarr_instance=~"$tdarr_instance", node_name=~"$node_name"} and on (worker_id) tdarr_node_worker_info{tdarr_instance=~"$tdarr_instance", node_name=~"$node_name", flow_worker="true"})

sum by (worker_id) (tdarr_node_worker_output_file_size_bytes{tdarr_instance=~"$tdarr_instance", node_name=~"$node_name"} and on (worker_id) tdarr_node_worker_info{tdarr_instance=~"$tdarr_instance", node_name=~"$node_name", flow_worker="true"})

sum by (worker_id) (tdarr_node_worker_job_start_timestamp_seconds{tdarr_instance=~"$tdarr_instance", node_name=~"$node_name"} and on (worker_id) tdarr_node_worker_info{tdarr_instance=~"$tdarr_instance", node_name=~"$node_name", flow_worker="true"})

sum by (worker_id) (tdarr_node_worker_status_timestamp_seconds{tdarr_instance=~"$tdarr_instance", node_name=~"$node_name"} and on (worker_id) tdarr_node_worker_info{tdarr_instance=~"$tdarr_instance", node_name=~"$node_name", flow_worker="true"})

sum by (worker_id, worker_status) (tdarr_node_worker_status{tdarr_instance=~"$tdarr_instance", node_name=~"$node_name"} and on (worker_id) tdarr_node_worker_info{tdarr_instance=~"$tdarr_instance", node_name=~"$node_name", flow_worker="true"})

sum by (worker_id) (tdarr_node_worker_idle{tdarr_instance=~"$tdarr_instance", node_name=~"$node_name"} and on (worker_id) tdarr_node_worker_info{tdarr_instance=~"$tdarr_instance", node_name=~"$node_name", flow_worker="true"})

sum by (worker_id) (tdarr_node_worker_step_start_timestamp_seconds{tdarr_instance=~"$tdarr_instance", node_name=~"$node_name"} and on (worker_id) tdarr_node_worker_info{tdarr_instance=~"$tdarr_instance", node_name=~"$node_name", flow_worker="true"})

sum by (worker_id) (tdarr_node_worker_ratio{tdarr_instance=~"$tdarr_instance", node_name=~"$node_name"} and on (worker_id) tdarr_node_worker_info{tdarr_instance=~"$tdarr_instance", node_name=~"$node_name", flow_worker="false", worker_type="healthcheck"})

sum by (worker_id) (tdarr_node_worker_fps{tdarr_instance=~"$tdarr_instance", node_name=~"$node_name"} and on (worker_id) tdarr_node_worker_info{tdarr_instance=~"$tdarr_instance", node_name=~"$node_name", flow_worker="false", worker_type="healthcheck"})

sum by (worker_id) (tdarr_node_worker_eta_seconds{tdarr_instance=~"$tdarr_instance", node_name=~"$node_name"} and on (worker_id) tdarr_node_worker_info{tdarr_instance=~"$tdarr_instance", node_name=~"$node_name", flow_worker="false", worker_type="healthcheck"})

sum by (worker_id) (tdarr_node_worker_original_file_size_bytes{tdarr_instance=~"$tdarr_instance", node_name=~"$node_name"} and on (worker_id) tdarr_node_worker_info{tdarr_instance=~"$tdarr_instance", node_name=~"$node_name", flow_worker="false", worker_type="healthcheck"})

sum by (worker_id) (tdarr_node_worker_est_file_size_bytes{tdarr_instance=~"$tdarr_instance", node_name=~"$node_name"} and on (worker_id) tdarr_node_worker_info{tdarr_instance=~"$tdarr_instance", node_name=~"$node_name", flow_worker="false", worker_type="healthcheck"})

sum by (worker_id) (tdarr_node_worker_output_file_size_bytes{tdarr_instance=~"$tdarr_instance", node_name=~"$node_name"} and on (worker_id) tdarr_node_worker_info{tdarr_instance=~"$tdarr_instance", node_name=~"$node_name", flow_worker="false", worker_type="healthcheck"})

sum by (worker_id) (tdarr_node_worker_job_start_timestamp_seconds{tdarr_instance=~"$tdarr_instance", node_name=~"$node_name"} and on (worker_id) tdarr_node_worker_info{tdarr_instance=~"$tdarr_instance", node_name=~"$node_name", flow_worker="false", worker_type="healthcheck"})

sum by (worker_id) (tdarr_node_worker_status_timestamp_seconds{tdarr_instance=~"$tdarr_instance", node_name=~"$node_name"} and on (worker_id) tdarr_node_worker_info{tdarr_instance=~"$tdarr_instance", node_name=~"$node_name", flow_worker="false", worker_type="healthcheck"})

sum by (worker_id, worker_status) (tdarr_node_worker_status{tdarr_instance=~"$tdarr_instance", node_name=~"$node_name"} and on (worker_id) tdarr_node_worker_info{tdarr_instance=~"$tdarr_instance", node_name=~"$node_name", flow_worker="false", worker_type="healthcheck"})

sum by (worker_id) (tdarr_node_worker_idle{tdarr_instance=~"$tdarr_instance", node_name=~"$node_name"} and on (worker_id) tdarr_node_worker_info{tdarr_instance=~"$tdarr_instance", node_name=~"$node_name", flow_worker="false", worker_type="healthcheck"})

sum by (worker_id) (tdarr_node_worker_ratio{tdarr_instance=~"$tdarr_instance", node_name=~"$node_name"} and on (worker_id) tdarr_node_worker_info{tdarr_instance=~"$tdarr_instance", node_name=~"$node_name", flow_worker="false", worker_type="transcode"})

sum by (worker_id) (tdarr_node_worker_fps{tdarr_instance=~"$tdarr_instance", node_name=~"$node_name"} and on (worker_id) tdarr_node_worker_info{tdarr_instance=~"$tdarr_instance", node_name=~"$node_name", flow_worker="false", worker_type="transcode"})

sum by (worker_id) (tdarr_node_worker_eta_seconds{tdarr_instance=~"$tdarr_instance", node_name=~"$node_name"} and on (worker_id) tdarr_node_worker_info{tdarr_instance=~"$tdarr_instance", node_name=~"$node_name", flow_worker="false", worker_type="transcode"})

sum by (worker_id) (tdarr_node_worker_original_file_size_bytes{tdarr_instance=~"$tdarr_instance", node_name=~"$node_name"} and on (worker_id) tdarr_node_worker_info{tdarr_instance=~"$tdarr_instance", node_name=~"$node_name", flow_worker="false", worker_type="transcode"})

sum by (worker_id) (tdarr_node_worker_est_file_size_bytes{tdarr_instance=~"$tdarr_instance", node_name=~"$node_name"} and on (worker_id) tdarr_node_worker_info{tdarr_instance=~"$tdarr_instance", node_name=~"$node_name", flow_worker="false", worker_type="transcode"})

sum by (worker_id) (tdarr_node_worker_output_file_size_bytes{tdarr_instance=~"$tdarr_instance", node_name=~"$node_name"} and on (worker_id) tdarr_node_worker_info{tdarr_instance=~"$tdarr_instance", node_name=~"$node_name", flow_worker="false", worker_type="transcode"})

sum by (worker_id) (tdarr_node_worker_job_start_timestamp_seconds{tdarr_instance=~"$tdarr_instance", node_name=~"$node_name"} and on (worker_id) tdarr_node_worker_info{tdarr_instance=~"$tdarr_instance", node_name=~"$node_name", flow_worker="false", worker_type="transcode"})

sum by (worker_id) (tdarr_node_worker_status_timestamp_seconds{tdarr_instance=~"$tdarr_instance", node_name=~"$node_name"} and on (worker_id) tdarr_node_worker_info{tdarr_instance=~"$tdarr_instance", node_name=~"$node_name", flow_worker="false", worker_type="transcode"})

sum by (worker_id, worker_status) (tdarr_node_worker_status{tdarr_instance=~"$tdarr_instance", node_name=~"$node_name"} and on (worker_id) tdarr_node_worker_info{tdarr_instance=~"$tdarr_instance", node_name=~"$node_name", flow_worker="false", worker_type="transcode"})

sum by (worker_id, worker_plugin_id, worker_plugin_position) (tdarr_node_worker_plugin{tdarr_instance=~"$tdarr_instance", node_name=~"$node_name"} and on (worker_id) tdarr_node_worker_info{tdarr_instance=~"$tdarr_instance", node_name=~"$node_name", flow_worker="false", worker_type="transcode"})

sum by (worker_id) (tdarr_node_worker_idle{tdarr_instance=~"$tdarr_instance", node_name=~"$node_name"} and on (worker_id) tdarr_node_worker_info{tdarr_instance=~"$tdarr_instance", node_name=~"$node_name", flow_worker="false", worker_type="transcode"})

sum by (worker_id) (tdarr_node_worker_step_start_timestamp_seconds{tdarr_instance=~"$tdarr_instance", node_name=~"$node_name"} and on (worker_id) tdarr_node_worker_info{tdarr_instance=~"$tdarr_instance", node_name=~"$node_name", flow_worker="false", worker_type="transcode"})

panels.title: Active Workers by Node and Type
Queue Depth by Node and Type

panels.description: Sum of all active worker FPS. Variance reflects content mix (4K HDR vs 720p), but trend over time indicates fleet encoding throughput.
panels.title: Fleet Throughput (FPS)

panels.description: Per-worker progress percentage over time. Useful for spotting stuck workers.
panels.title: Worker Progress (%)

panels.description: Per-worker frames-per-second over time. Complements fleet throughput by surfacing individual worker performance degradation.
panels.title: Worker FPS

panels.description: Per-worker estimated time remaining over time. Useful for tracking long-running encodes.
panels.title: Worker ETA (seconds)

panels.description: Whether the Tdarr node is paused. Paused = the node stops spawning new transcode/health-check workers (in-progress jobs may still finish). NO = ready or actively processing.
panels.title: Node Paused

panels.description: Time since this node's worker process last started.
panels.title: Node Uptime

panels.description: GPU device this node targets for transcodes, from the node's GPU config. Auto = Tdarr picks the GPU; any other value is the specific GPU the node is pinned to.
panels.title: GPU Select

panels.description: Node scheduling priority from the node's config (the node_priority label on tdarr_node_info). Lower number = higher priority.
panels.title: Node Priority

panels.description: If Node is GPU worker that has "CPU Tasks" enabled, "CPU/GPU" tasks will be the same
panels.title: Queue Depth by Type

panels.description: Counter bumps when Tdarr returns a status string not in the exporter's known enum. Non-zero values indicate Tdarr added/renamed a status — file an issue at homeylab/tdarr-exporter to update the enum. Status is still emitted under a normalized label; this is a maintainer signal, not an operator alert.
panels.title: Unknown Tdarr Statuses

panels.description: Current open file descriptors as a fraction of the process limit (process_open_fds / process_max_fds). The limit is often the container default (~1M), so this normally reads near zero; watch for sustained climbs (descriptor leak) or values approaching 1.
panels.title: File Descriptors (% of limit)
